retrieved_result: Three Great Options Tweet Three Great Options Cutting a diamond is no simple matter; it takes precision and skill to cut the rough diamond in a way that will ensure maximum diamond brilliance and sparkle. It all began back in the 15 th century when diamond cutters first started to explore the best way to cut a diamond.

history.title: Three Great Options
history.description: Tweet Three Great Options Cutting a diamond is no simple matter; it takes precision and skill to cut the rough diamond in a way that will ensure maximum diamond brilliance and sparkle. It all began back in the 15 th century when diamond cutters first started to explore the best way to cut a diamond.
